title: Core types, UUID helper, and MVP models + validators

task.description: Add shared offline-first types, UUID generator, and minimal TS models for onboarding + workouts + sync queue. Include a pure onboarding validator enforcing height/weight ranges and goal enum; ensure strict TS compiles without app wiring.
acceptance_criteria: src/lib/types.ts exports SyncStatus union exactly "pending"|"synced"|"error" and ApiErrorResponse shape { error: string; details?: any }
src/lib/types.ts exports IsoDateString and IsoDateTimeString as string alias types
createUuid() returns a string with length >= 8 and is not all whitespace
validateOnboardingProfileInput({goal,heightCm,weightKg}) returns ok:false with fieldErrors.heightCm when heightCm<80 or >250; returns fieldErrors.weightKg when weightKg<20 or >300
WorkoutSession/ExerciseEntry/SetEntry/CardioEntry types include id, foreign keys, createdAt, updatedAt, syncStatus; SetEntry includes restPlannedSec and completedAt fields
SyncQueueItem type includes id, createdAt, attemptCount, status, method, path, body, entityType, entityId, lastError?

definition_of_done: All new exports are used or intentionally exported without lint errors
No runtime code path required; app compiles after merge
